title: April 24
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|April|hide31=yes}}

'''April 24''' is the 114th day of the year (115th in leap years). There are 251 days remaining.
</noinclude>
*[[1930s#1933|1933]] – [[Claire Davenport]] is born.
*[[1940s#1949|1949]] – [[Peter Friedman]] is born.
*[[1960s#1968|1968]] – [[Stacy Haiduk]] is born.
*[[1970]] – [[Kiff VandenHeuvel]] is born.
*[[1973]] – [[Damon Lindelof]] is born.
*[[1979]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 25|''Star Wars'' (1977) 25]] published.
*[[2002]] – [[Star Wars: Episode II — Attack of the Clones 1|''Star Wars: Episode II — Attack of the Clones'' 1]], [[Star Wars: Episode II — Attack of the Clones 2|2]], and [[Star Wars: Episode II — Attack of the Clones (TPB)|trade paperback]] published.
*2002 – [[The Official Star Wars Fact File 17|''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 17]] published.
*[[2005]] – [[Celebration III]] ends.
*[[2007]] – ''[[The Making of Star Wars: The Definitive Story Behind the Original Film]]'' released.
*2007 – [[Star Wars Insider 93|''Star Wars Insider'' 93]] published.
*[[2012]] – [[Scourge (novel)|''Scourge'']] published.
*[[2019]] – [[Kashyyyk]] added to Capital Supremacy in [[Star Wars Battlefront II]].
*2019 – [[Vader - Dark Visions 3|''Vader - Dark Visions'' 3]] published.
*2019 – [[Galaxy's Edge 1|''Galaxy's Edge'' 1]] published.
*2019 – [[Doctor Aphra (2016) 31|''Doctor Aphra'' (2016) 31]] published.
*[[2020]] – "[[The Phantom Apprentice]]" airs on [[Disney+]].
*2020 – "[[An Unlikely Friendship (Galaxy of Adventures)|An Unlikely Friendship]]" is uploaded on YouTube.
*2020 – ''[[The Art of Star Wars Rebels]]'' published.
*[[2024]] – "[[Flash Strike]]" airs on Disney+.
*2024 – [[Darth Maul – Black, White & Red 1|''Darth Maul – Black, White & Red'' 1]] published.
*2024 – [[Jango Fett 2|''Jango Fett'' 2]] published.
*2024 – [[The High Republic Adventures (2023) 5|''The High Republic Adventures'' (2023) 5]] published.
<noinclude>
